children.title: Python Basics
children.content: Python is a high-level programming language known for its simplicity and readability. It supports multiple paradigms including procedural, object-oriented, and functional programming.

children.title: JavaScript Guide
children.content: JavaScript is a scripting language used primarily for web development. It runs in the browser and enables dynamic content on websites.

children.title: Programming Kya Hoti Hai
children.content: Programming ek aisi skill hai jisme hum computer ko instructions dete hain. Python, Java, aur JavaScript sabse popular coding languages hain jo developers use karte hain apne software banane ke liye.

children.title: Coding Seekhna Kyun Zaroori Hai
children.content: Aaj ke digital zamane mein coding seekhna bahut important hai. Isse hum websites, apps, aur software bana sakte hain. Programming logic aur problem-solving skills develop karta hai.

children.title: Coding Sikhne Ka Tarika
children.content: Bhai coding sikhni hai toh pehle basics clear karo. Python best hai beginners ke liye kyunki iska syntax easy hota hai. Ek baar logic samajh aa gaya toh sab languages easy lagti hain. Daily practice karo.

children.title: Machine Learning Intro
children.content: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.

children.title: AI aur Machine Learning Hindi Mein
children.content: Artificial Intelligence matlab computer ko insaan ki tarah sochna sikhana. Machine learning mein computer data se khud seekhta hai bina explicitly program kiye. Yeh technology bahut tezi se badh rahi hai.

children.title: Data Science Basics
children.content: Data science mein hum bahut saara data collect karke usse analyze karte hain. Isse business decisions lene mein madad milti hai. Python aur R data science ke liye sabse popular tools hain.

children.title: AI Machine ko Kaise Sikhata Hai
children.content: Dekho AI mein hota kya hai, computer ko bahut saara data dete hain aur wo khud patterns seekh leta hai. Jaise tumne hazaron cats ki photos dikhao toh computer khud cat identify karna seekh jaata hai.

children.title: Database Systems
children.content: A database is an organized collection of structured data. SQL databases use tables and relationships, while NoSQL databases store data in flexible formats.

children.title: Database Samajhna Easy Hai
children.content: Database ek tarah ka organized store hota hai data ke liye. Socho jaise ek almirah mein sab cheezein arranged hain. MySQL, MongoDB popular databases hain. SQL se hum data query kar sakte hain.

children.title: React Framework
children.content: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces. It uses a component-based architecture and a virtual DOM for efficient rendering.

children.title: App Kaise Banate Hain
children.content: App banana ke liye pehle decide karo ki Android ke liye banana hai ya iOS ke liye. Android mein Java ya Kotlin use hoti hai, iOS mein Swift. React Native se ek hi code mein dono platforms ke liye app bana sakte ho.

children.title: API Design
children.content: REST APIs use HTTP methods like GET, POST, PUT, DELETE to perform operations on resources. They are stateless and follow a client-server model.

children.title: Cloud Computing
children.content: Cloud computing delivers computing services over the internet including servers, storage, databases, networking, and software on a pay-as-you-go basis.

children.title: Docker and Containers
children.content: Docker is a platform for developing and running applications in containers. Containers package code and dependencies together for consistent environments.

children.title: Cloud Kya Hota Hai
children.content: Cloud computing matlab internet ke through computing services lena. AWS, Google Cloud, aur Azure popular cloud platforms hain. Isse companies ko apna khud ka server nahi rakhna padta.

children.title: Server aur Hosting Kya Hota Hai
children.content: Jab tumhari website internet pe hoti hai toh wo kisi server pe store hoti hai. Hosting matlab apni website ke liye server space lena. Shared hosting sasti hoti hai, dedicated server mehnga hota hai lekin fast hota hai.

children.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
children.content: Cybersecurity protects systems and networks from digital attacks. Key concepts include encryption, firewalls, authentication, and vulnerability management.

children.title: Cyber Security Hindi Guide
children.content: Cyber security matlab apne computer aur data ko online threats se bachana. Hacker log aapka data chura sakte hain isliye strong password aur antivirus bahut zaroori hai. Phishing attacks se savdhan rahein.

children.title: Internet Security Tips Hinglish
children.content: Yaar apna password strong rakho, date of birth wala mat rakho. Public WiFi pe banking mat karo. Har jagah alag password use karo. Two factor authentication on karo, bahut safe rehta hai.

children.title: Git Version Control
children.content: Git is a distributed version control system that tracks changes in source code. Developers use branches, commits, and merges to collaborate efficiently.

children.title: Employee Benefits Overview
children.content: The company offers comprehensive financial perks including health insurance, 401k matching up to 6%, stock options, annual bonuses, and tuition reimbursement.

children.title: Q3 Revenue Report
children.content: Q3 revenue grew 23% compared to the 2023 baseline of $4.2M established in the annual introduction. The growth was driven primarily by enterprise subscriptions and new market expansion.

children.title: Arthvyavastha aur GDP
children.content: GDP yaani Gross Domestic Product kisi desh ki economic health ka measure hai. Jab GDP badhti hai toh economy strong hoti hai. India ki GDP growth rate consistently high rahi hai last decade mein.

children.title: Inflation aur Mehengai
children.content: Inflation matlab cheezein meheng hoti jaati hain time ke saath. Jab bahut zyada paisa market mein aa jaata hai toh prices badhti hain. RBI interest rates badhakar inflation control karta hai India mein.

children.title: Stock Market Basics Hindi
children.content: Share market mein hum companies ke shares khareedte hain. Jab company profit mein hoti hai toh share price badhti hai. BSE aur NSE India ke main stock exchanges hain. Investment se pehle research zaroor karo.

children.title: Economic Growth and Development
children.content: Economic development means improving the standard of living for all citizens. It includes factors like per capita income, literacy rate, healthcare access, and infrastructure. Sustainable development balances growth with environmental responsibility.

children.title: Paisa Invest Karna Kyun Zaroori Hai
children.content: Bhai paisa bank mein rakhoge toh inflation use kha jaayegi. Mutual funds, SIP, stocks mein invest karo. SIP matlab Systematic Investment Plan, thoda thoda paisa regularly lagate raho. Long term mein bahut fayda hota hai.

children.title: Cryptocurrency aur Bitcoin
children.content: Crypto ek digital currency hai jo blockchain technology pe kaam karti hai. Bitcoin sabse pehli aur popular cryptocurrency hai. Bahut volatile hoti hai iska matlab price bahut upar neeche hoti hai. High risk high reward.

children.title: Paryavaran Sanrakshan
children.content: Paryavaran yaani environment ko bachana aaj ke time ki sabse badi zaroorat hai. Global warming badh rahi hai, glaciers pighal rahe hain. Plastic ka use kam karo, trees lagao, bijli bachao. Hamare future ke liye zaroori hai.

children.title: Climate Change Reality
children.content: Climate change is the long-term shift in global temperatures and weather patterns. Human activities like burning fossil fuels release greenhouse gases causing global warming. Rising sea levels threaten coastal cities worldwide.

children.title: Pollution Problem Hinglish
children.content: Yaar pollution ek serious problem ban gayi hai. Air pollution se log saans ki bimariyan ho rahi hain. Delhi mein winter mein AQI bahut kharab ho jaati hai. Gaadi ki jagah cycle chalao ya public transport use karo.

children.title: Renewable Energy Sources
children.content: Renewable energy comes from natural sources that replenish themselves. Solar power, wind energy, and hydroelectric power are clean alternatives to fossil fuels. India has set ambitious targets for solar energy production by 2030.

children.title: Solar Energy Kya Hai
children.content: Solar energy matlab suraj ki roshni se bijli banana. Solar panels rooftop pe lagate hain aur ye bijli banate hain. Ek baar install karo toh 25 saal tak free bijli milti hai. Government subsidy bhi milti hai India mein.

children.title: Jal Sanrakshan Zaroori Hai
children.content: Paani bahut precious resource hai lekin hum issi barbaad karte hain. Rainwater harvesting se paani store kar sakte hain. Nadi aur lakes ko pollute mat karo. Pani bachana humari zimmedaari hai aane waali generation ke liye.

children.title: Indian Politics Overview
children.content: India is the world's largest democracy with a parliamentary system of government. The President is the constitutional head while the Prime Minister leads the executive. Elections are conducted by the Election Commission every five years.

children.title: Rajniti aur Chunav
children.content: Loktantra matlab janata ki sarkar. India mein har paanch saal mein Lok Sabha chunav hote hain. EVM yaani Electronic Voting Machine se vote dete hain. Apna vote dena har nagarik ka adhikar aur farz hai.

children.title: Government Policies Hinglish
children.content: Modi sarkar ne kai badi policies launch ki hain jaise Make in India, Digital India, aur Startup India. Inse desh mein jobs badhi hain aur foreign investment aaya hai. Lekin kuch log kehte hain implementation mein kami hai.

children.title: Democracy and Human Rights
children.content: Democracy ensures that every citizen has the right to vote, freedom of speech, and equal rights under law. Human rights include right to life, education, healthcare, and protection from discrimination.

children.title: GST aur Tax System
children.content: GST yaani Goods and Services Tax ne India mein sabhi indirect taxes ko ek kar diya. Ab ek nation one tax. Isse business karna thoda simple hua hai. Input tax credit milta hai jo cost kam karta hai businesses ke liye.

children.title: Corruption aur Bhrashtachar
children.content: Bhrashtachar matlab sarkaari kaam ke liye riswat dena. Ye development ko rok deta hai. RTI yaani Right to Information Act se hum sarkar se koi bhi information maang sakte hain. Jago nagrik jago.

children.title: Samajik Nyay aur Barabari
children.content: Samajik nyay matlab sab logo ko barabar mauka milna chahiye chahe wo kisi bhi jaati ya dharm ke hon. Reservation system backward classes ko aage lane ke liye hai. Discrimination karna galat hai aur constitutional rights ke against hai.

children.title: Education System in India
children.content: India's education system is one of the largest in the world. The New Education Policy 2020 aims to transform learning with focus on skills rather than rote learning. Digital education expanded rapidly during and after COVID pandemic.

children.title: Shiksha Ka Mahatva
children.content: Padhai sirf degree lene ke liye nahi hoti, asli shiksha woh hai jo tumhe sochna sikhaye. Sarkaari schools ki halat sudharni chahiye. Mid day meal scheme se bacchon ki school attendance badhi hai. Har bacche ko quality education milni chahiye.

children.title: Mental Health Awareness
children.content: Mental health is as important as physical health. Depression, anxiety, and stress are common issues in modern society. Seeking therapy is not a sign of weakness. India needs more mental health professionals and awareness campaigns.

children.title: Mahila Sashaktikaran
children.content: Women empowerment matlab mahilaon ko equal rights aur opportunities dena. Beti Bachao Beti Padhao scheme se ladkiyon ki education badhi hai. Workplace mein gender equality honi chahiye. Mahila safety ek serious concern hai India mein.

children.title: Youth aur Social Media
children.content: Aaj kal ka youth social media pe bahut time waste karta hai. Instagram, YouTube, Twitter pe ghante nikal jaate hain. Lekin sahi use karoge toh social media se bahut kuch seekh sakte ho aur career bhi bana sakte ho. Balance zaroori hai.

children.title: Unemployment Problem
children.content: Berozgaari ek badi samasya hai India mein. Engineering ke baad bhi bahut se graduates ko job nahi milti. Skill development zaroori hai. Coding, digital marketing, data science seekhoge toh zyada opportunities honge. Startup bhi ek option hai.

children.title: Poverty and Inequality
children.content: Income inequality remains a major challenge globally. The gap between rich and poor continues to widen. Social welfare programs, progressive taxation, and universal basic income are proposed solutions to reduce poverty.

children.title: Critical Thinking aur Logic
children.content: Logical thinking matlab har baat ko evidence ke basis pe judge karna. Jab koi news padho toh pehle source check karo. Fake news bahut failti hai social media pe. Apna dimag khud use karo, blindly believe mat karo kisi ki baat.

children.title: Problem Solving Skills
children.content: Problem solving is a critical skill in both technical and non-technical fields. Break complex problems into smaller parts, analyze each part, and find systematic solutions. This approach works for coding, business, and personal challenges.

children.title: Decision Making Framework
children.content: Acha decision lene ke liye pehle saare options list karo, pros aur cons dekho, aur phir decide karo. Emotion mein aake decision mat lo. Data aur facts pe basis karo apne choices ko. Hasty decisions aksar regret dete hain.

children.title: Statistical Thinking
children.content: Statistics help us make sense of data and draw meaningful conclusions. Understanding concepts like mean, median, standard deviation, and probability helps in making informed decisions in business, science, and everyday life.

children.title: Algorithmic Thinking Kya Hai
children.content: Algorithm matlab step by step solution. Jaise recipe hoti hai khana banane ki waise algorithm hota hai problem solve karne ka. Computer programs actually algorithms hi hote hain. Isko programming ke alawa real life mein bhi use kar sakte ho.
